title: Don't Look Back... I Know Your Origins
original_title: Jangan Pandang Belakang 2: Aku Tahu Asal Usulmu
overview: Opah's Saka is looking for a new victim to tie up. However, there are obstacles and mysteries that cause various horrific incidents to occur.
